entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., a crop grown in dry environments)

entities.name: NORTH WEST INDIA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is commonly grown)

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: State in India where dry environments were observed)

entities.name: DRY ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by erratic rainfall and water stress)

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: Unpredictable rainfall patterns leading to variable yields)

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress categorized as control, mild, moderate, and severe)

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The overall productivity of the crop, which is highly variable in dry environments)

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by the crop)

entities.name: GRAIN MASS
entities.description: The weight of the grains produced)

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER
entities.description: The number of grains produced)

entities.name: TILLER NUMBER
entities.description: The number of tillers per plant)

entities.name: PHI
entities.description: A trait associated with severe water stress)

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The yield of the vegetative part of the plant)

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration until the plant reaches the flowering stage)

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying quantitative trait loci and their interactions)

entities.name: LG 2
entities.description: Linkage group associated with grain yield components, tiller number, and PHI)

entities.name: LG 4
entities.description: Linkage group associated with stover yield and flowering time)

entities.name: LG 6
entities.description: Linkage group associated with stover yield and flowering time)

entities.name: RIL CROSS
entities.description: Recombinant Inbred Line cross used to generate F7 progenies)

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Genetic variants from H 77/833-2 and PRLT 2/89-33 that influence yield)

entities.name: IDEOTYPES
entities.description: Environment-specific plant types designed for adaptability)
